title: Flat Cats
description: A mod about flat cat images
body:
![A cat surprised, above him says "Depends on Architectury"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbf31ac8054d4b8558012b44ded373404f8f3f2c_0.webp)

Flat Cats adds simple, 2D PNG cat entities that wander aimlessly around your world. They're just images of cats.
